metadata.description: Launch a white-label AI Agency in days, powered by the Review Marketing Flywheel for local businesses.
metadata.lpDescription:
Soon €27/month. For new and established agency owners who want to sell a white-label AI system to local businesses and create predictable monthly recurring revenue.

Practical strategies, real operator insights, and a community focused on execution.

What you get:
✅ Weekly live webinars with the founders, including open AMA sessions
✅ Monthly live sales training with industry experts
✅ Community resources, including templates, scripts, and proven strategies
✅ A group focused on execution and sales, not endless talking
✅ Free course to help turn your agency into a recurring revenue machine
